personas: Motivated User: Regularly reads motivational phrases and wants to share feedback through ratings.
New Visitor: Browses motivational phrases casually and may rate a phrase if engaged.
Power User: Logged-in user who rates multiple phrases and checks average ratings for community insight.
key_flows: User opens the phrase display screen, reads a motivational phrase, and rates it using the star rating component (0-5).
User submits a rating and receives confirmation or error message based on validation and authentication.
User views a phrase and sees the average community rating or their personal rating if logged in.
Backend receives rating input via API, validates, authenticates, and stores it linked to user and phrase.
friction_points: Rating input not clearly visible or intuitive, leading to low engagement with rating feature.
Users submitting invalid ratings (non-integer or out-of-range values) resulting in errors.
Unclear feedback after rating submission causing confusion if rating was saved successfully.
Slow or unresponsive UI during rating submission causing user frustration.

information_architecture.hierarchy: Primary focus is the motivational phrase with rating UI prominently below or beside it; secondary information includes average rating and user rating. Navigation prioritizes access to phrases, user profile (for logged-in users), and rating history if applicable.
navigation: Home - List or feed of motivational phrases
Phrase Detail - Screen showing full phrase and rating UI
User Profile - Displays user’s own ratings and history
categorization: Motivational Phrases categorized by theme or topic (e.g., Inspiration, Success, Wellness)
Ratings categorized by phrase and optionally by user

layout_structure.type: single-column focused layout with modular components
components: Header (with navigation and user profile access)
Phrase Display area (large text, centered or left-aligned)
Rating Component (star rating or numeric input directly below phrase)
Average Rating Display (below or next to rating component)

responsive.mobile: Stacked vertically: phrase text at top, rating component below, average rating and feedback message beneath; touch-friendly star size and spacing.
responsive.tablet: Similar to mobile but with increased spacing and font size; possibly two-column layout with phrase on left and rating/average rating on right.
responsive.desktop: Two-column layout: phrase takes left side of screen, rating component, average rating, and submission feedback on right side with ample whitespace.

design_system.typography: Use a clean, legible sans-serif font such as 'Inter' or 'Roboto'. Phrase text at 24-32px for prominence, rating labels at 16px, feedback messages at 14px. Font weights: phrase bold (700), supporting text regular (400).
design_system.colors: Primary color palette includes a strong blue for interactive elements (#0055FF), neutral dark gray for text (#222222), light gray backgrounds (#F5F5F5), and gold (#FFC107) for filled star ratings. Error color: red (#D32F2F). Success color: green (#388E3C).
design_system.spacing: Base spacing increments of 8px. Margins and paddings in multiples of 8 or 16px for consistent rhythm. Example: 16px margin below phrase text, 12px spacing between stars.
components: Star Rating Component: clickable stars with filled and empty states, keyboard focusable, with numeric input fallback.
Feedback Message Banner: visible success or error messages below rating input.
Button: Submit rating with disabled state before valid input.
Average Rating Display: numeric and star visualization.

accessibility.keyboard_nav: All interactive elements (stars, submit button) must be operable via keyboard (tab to focus, arrows or space/enter to select rating). Focus outlines clearly visible.
accessibility.screen_reader: Rating component should have ARIA labels, e.g., 'Rate this phrase from 0 to 5 stars'. Announce submission success or error messages dynamically using ARIA live regions.
accessibility.contrast_ratio: All text and interactive elements meet minimum contrast ratio of 4.5:1 against backgrounds.

states: default: stars outlined or empty, submit button enabled if valid rating
hover: star highlights on hover with tooltip showing numeric value
active: star fills solid color on selection
disabled: submit button disabled if no valid rating input
error: rating input border and error message in red if invalid input or submission error
interactions.animations: Smooth fill transition for stars on hover and selection (~150ms ease-in-out). Fade-in/out for feedback messages (~300ms).
interactions.loading_state: Submit button shows spinner or loading indicator while rating is being sent; disables input during loading.
interactions.empty_state: If no ratings exist for phrase, display 'No ratings yet' text with empty star outline in average rating area.
